languages.original_text: "O wisest of men, your language is so rich and clear, not like the other adepts of the Omnissiah! Do tell me more about this ergonomics of yours... and other mysteries of the Mechanicus..."

languages.text: "Мудрейший, ваш слог так богат и внятен, не то, что у прочих адептов Омниссии! Не поведаете ли вы мне побольше об этой вашей эргономике... и прочих таинствах Механикус?"
"O wisest of men, your language is so rich and clear, not like the other adepts of the Omnissiah! Do tell me more about this ergonomics of yours... and other mysteries of the Mechanicus..."

"O wisest of men, your language is so rich and clear, not like the other adepts of the Omnissiah! Do tell me more about this ergonomics of yours... and other mysteries of the Mechanicus..."

languages.text: «¡Oh, sabio entre los sabios, su vocabulario es tan rico y claro, no como el de otros adeptos del Omnissiah! Cuéntememe más sobre esta ergonomía suya... y otros misterios del Mechanicus...».
languages.original_text: "O wisest of men, your language is so rich and clear, not like the other adepts of the Omnissiah! Do tell me more about this ergonomics of yours... and other mysteries of the Mechanicus..."

traits.locale_text: «¡Oh, sabio entre los sabios, su vocabulario es tan rico y claro, no como el de otros adeptos del Omnissiah! Cuéntememe más sobre esta ergonomía suya... y otros misterios del Mechanicus...».

languages.text: 「おお、世にも賢きお方よ、あなた様の言葉は実に豊かで明晰で、ほかのオムニッシアの信徒たちとは大違いですわ！ ぜひ、その人間工学とやらについて、もっとお聞かせくださいな……それに、メカニクスのほかの秘儀についても……」
languages.original_text: "O wisest of men, your language is so rich and clear, not like the other adepts of the Omnissiah! Do tell me more about this ergonomics of yours... and other mysteries of the Mechanicus..."

traits.locale_text: 「おお、世にも賢きお方よ、あなた様の言葉は実に豊かで明晰で、ほかのオムニッシアの信徒たちとは大違いですわ！ ぜひ、その人間工学とやらについて、もっとお聞かせくださいな……それに、メカニクスのほかの秘儀についても……」

languages.text: “世间最睿智之人啊，你的言语是如此丰富且清晰，一点也不像欧姆尼赛亚的其他仆从！快给我讲讲你这个人体工学……还有机械修会的其他奥秘……”
languages.original_text: "O wisest of men, your language is so rich and clear, not like the other adepts of the Omnissiah! Do tell me more about this ergonomics of yours... and other mysteries of the Mechanicus..."

traits.locale_text: “世间最睿智之人啊，你的言语是如此丰富且清晰，一点也不像欧姆尼赛亚的其他仆从！快给我讲讲你这个人体工学……还有机械修会的其他奥秘……”

languages.text: "Oh, weisester aller Männer, Eure Sprache ist so reich und klar, nicht wie die der anderen Adepten des Omnissiah! Erzählt mir mehr von dieser Ergonomie ... und anderen Mysterien des Mechanicus ..."
languages.original_text: "O wisest of men, your language is so rich and clear, not like the other adepts of the Omnissiah! Do tell me more about this ergonomics of yours... and other mysteries of the Mechanicus..."

traits.locale_text: "Oh, weisester aller Männer, Eure Sprache ist so reich und klar, nicht wie die der anderen Adepten des Omnissiah! Erzählt mir mehr von dieser Ergonomie ... und anderen Mysterien des Mechanicus ..."

languages.text: « Ô sage parmi les sages, votre langue est si riche et limpide... pas comme celle des autres adeptes de l'Omnimessie ! Dites-m'en plus sur votre ergonomie... et sur les autres mystères du Mechanicus... »
languages.original_text: "O wisest of men, your language is so rich and clear, not like the other adepts of the Omnissiah! Do tell me more about this ergonomics of yours... and other mysteries of the Mechanicus..."

traits.locale_text: « Ô sage parmi les sages, votre langue est si riche et limpide... pas comme celle des autres adeptes de l'Omnimessie ! Dites-m'en plus sur votre ergonomie... et sur les autres mystères du Mechanicus... »

languages.text: "Ey bilge kimse... Dilin, Hermesih'in diğer uzmanları gibi değil. Ne kadar da zengin ve açık! Bana şu ergonominizden... Ve Mechanicus'un diğer gizemlerinden daha fazla bahset..."
